Marks this pipe side as a destination. Items are routed here with priority 0.
jei.fastpipes.improved_inserter_attachme: Marks this pipe side as a destination. Items are routed here with priority 1. Supports redstone mode.
jei.fastpipes.advanced_inserter_attachme: Marks this pipe side as a destination. Items are routed here with priority 2. Supports filters and redstone mode.
Marks this pipe side as a destination. Items are routed here with priority 3. Supports filters and redstone mode.
jei.fastpipes.ultimate_inserter_attachme: Marks this pipe side as a destination. Items are routed here with priority 4. Supports filters and redstone mode.
jei.fastpipes.basic_item_pipe.descriptio: Transports items between inventories. Basic speed and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.improved_item_pipe.descrip: Transports items between inventories. Improved speed and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.advanced_item_pipe.descrip: Transports items between inventories. Advanced speed and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.basic_fluid_pipe.descripti: Transports fluids between tanks. Basic transfer rate and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.improved_fluid_pipe.descri: Transports fluids between tanks. Improved transfer rate and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.advanced_fluid_pipe.descri: Transports fluids between tanks. Advanced transfer rate and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.elite_fluid_pipe.descripti: Transports fluids between tanks. Elite transfer rate and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.ultimate_fluid_pipe.descri: Transports fluids between tanks. Ultimate transfer rate and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.basic_energy_pipe.descript: Transports energy between machines. Basic transfer rate and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.improved_energy_pipe.descr: Transports energy between machines. Improved transfer rate and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.advanced_energy_pipe.descr: Transports energy between machines. Advanced transfer rate and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.elite_energy_pipe.descript: Transports energy between machines. Elite transfer rate and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.ultimate_energy_pipe.descr: Transports energy between machines. Ultimate transfer rate and capacity.
jei.fastpipes.basic_extractor_attachment: Extracts items or fluids from inventories/tanks. Basic extraction rate.
jei.fastpipes.improved_extractor_attachm: Extracts items or fluids from inventories/tanks. Improved extraction rate.
jei.fastpipes.advanced_extractor_attachm: Extracts items or fluids from inventories/tanks. Advanced extraction rate.
jei.fastpipes.elite_extractor_attachment: Extracts items or fluids from inventories/tanks. Elite extraction rate.
jei.fastpipes.ultimate_extractor_attachm: Extracts items or fluids from inventories/tanks. Ultimate extraction rate.
tooltip.fastpipes.extractor_attachment.h: Place on a pipe facing an inventory to pull items/fluids
tooltip.fastpipes.inserter_attachment.hi: Place on a pipe to mark it as an item destination
tooltip.fastpipes.attachment.place: Right-click a pipe side to place
tooltip.fastpipes.wrench.hint1: Right-click a pipe side to disconnect/reconnect
jei.fastpipes.wrench.description: Right-click a pipe side to disconnect or reconnect it. Sneak + right-click to break the pipe.
tooltip.fastpipes.void_attachment.hint: Destroys overflow items and fluids. Supports filtering.
tooltip.fastpipes.void_attachment.priori: Lowest priority — only receives when no other destination available
jei.fastpipes.void_attachment.descriptio: Place on an item or fluid pipe to destroy excess items/fluids. Acts as a lowest-priority destination — items and fluids are only voided when no other destination can accept them. Supports blacklist/whitelist filtering.
